## Quick Status Overview

### Phase 1 (Foundation): 85% Complete
- **@ax/schemas:** 100% - Complete type system
- **@ax/core:** 95% - Memory, router, session, agent systems
- **@ax/providers:** 80% - 4 providers implemented (Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, ax-cli)
- **@ax/algorithms:** 90% - ReScript routing, DAG, ranking algorithms
- **Testing:** 5% - Only 6 tests, need 40+

**Status:** Solid foundation, needs testing to complete

### Phase 2 (Providers & CLI): 40% Complete
- **CLI Package:** 0% - Completely missing (needs 2,500-3,000 LOC)
- **MCP Server:** 0% - Completely missing (needs 1,500-2,000 LOC)
- **Provider Integration:** 60% - Partial implementation
- **Agent Delegation:** 0% - Logic not yet implemented
- **Spec Engine:** 0% - Not implemented

**Status:** Critical gaps in CLI/MCP, other features partially done

---

## Three Critical Blocking Issues

### Issue #1: TypeScript Configuration (30 min to fix)
**Status:** BLOCKING  
**Severity:** HIGH

Missing `composite: true` flag in TypeScript configuration causes build errors.

**Impact:** Prevents `pnpm typecheck` from working  
**Fix:** Add one line to 4 tsconfig files  
**Action:** Do this immediately

### Issue #2: Missing CLI & MCP Packages (15+ hours to build)
**Status:** BLOCKING Phase 2  
**Severity:** HIGH

Three packages have no implementation:
- `packages/cli/` - No files exist
- `packages/mcp/` - No files exist
- `packages/patching/` - Placeholder only

**Impact:** Cannot build executable CLI  
**Fix:** Create package.json and implement all commands/tools  
**Action:** Start in Week 2 after Phase 1 tests complete

### Issue #3: ax-cli SDK Dependency (1-2 hours to resolve)
**Status:** CRITICAL for Phase 2  
**Severity:** CRITICAL

Code imports `@anthropic/ax-cli-sdk` which may not exist.

**Impact:** ax-cli provider cannot be built without verification  
**Fix:** Verify package exists or refactor to use process spawning  
**Action:** Resolve before Phase 2 begins

---

## Implementation Timeline

### Immediate (Today): 30 minutes
```
Priority 1: Fix TypeScript configuration
- Add "composite": true to all tsconfig.json files
- Run pnpm typecheck to verify
```

### Week 1: Phase 1 Completion (10-15 hours)
```
Priority 1: Complete all Phase 1 tests
- Memory manager tests (2 hours)
- Router tests (2 hours)
- Session manager tests (1.5 hours)
- Agent system tests (2 hours)
- Provider tests (2 hours)
- Algorithm tests (1.5 hours)
- Coverage verification (1 hour)
```

### Week 2-3: Phase 2 Implementation (26-35 hours)
```
Priority 1: CLI Package (6-8 hours)
Priority 1: MCP Server (5-6 hours)
Priority 2: Delegation & Spec Engine (5-7 hours)
Priority 2: Testing & Integration (5-7 hours)
Priority 3: Documentation (2-3 hours)
```

### Expected Delivery
- **Phase 1 Complete:** End of Week 1
- **Phase 2 Feature Complete:** End of Week 3
- **v11.0.0 Production Ready:** End of Week 4

---

## Key Findings

### What's Working Well
- Comprehensive schema system with Zod validation
- Solid core orchestration engine
- Clean provider abstraction with 4 working implementations
- Well-designed algorithms in ReScript
- Good code organization and documentation
- Fast build times (<30 seconds)

### What Needs Attention
- Testing coverage extremely low (5%)
- CLI and MCP packages completely missing
- Some provider implementations incomplete
- Checkpoint persistence mechanism unclear
- Agent-to-agent delegation not fully implemented

### Code Metrics
- **Total LOC:** 8,356 (7,650 TS + 706 ReScript)
- **Packages:** 4 active, 3 placeholder
- **Test Files:** 1 (need 20+)
- **Build Time:** <30 seconds (good)
- **Test Coverage:** ~5% (need >85%)

## Estimated Effort

### Phase 1 (From Today)
- TypeScript config: 0.5 hours
- SDK resolution: 1-2 hours
- Package setup: 1 hour
- Testing: 8-10 hours
- **Total: 10-13 hours**

### Phase 2 (After Phase 1)
- CLI package: 6-8 hours
- MCP server: 5-6 hours
- Delegation: 2-3 hours
- Spec engine: 3-4 hours
- Testing: 4-5 hours
- Documentation: 2-3 hours
- **Total: 26-35 hours**

### Grand Total
**36-48 hours** (4-6 weeks at 1 dev full-time, or 2 weeks at 2 devs)

## Success Criteria

### Phase 1 Success
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` shows zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm test` shows >20 passing tests
- [ ] Test coverage >80%
- [ ] All packages fully functional

### Phase 2 Success
- [ ] CLI fully functional
- [ ] MCP server working
- [ ] All 4 providers tested
- [ ] Agent delegation working
- [ ] Test coverage >70%
- [ ] v11.0.0 ready to publish
